sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports experiencing persistent breast tenderness and reports palpable breast lumps. He also states he's experiencing some breast pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals unremarkable skin and breast tissue. No signs of inflammation or redness are noted. Palpation reveals palpable breast masses bilaterally.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's reported breast tenderness and palpable breast lumps raise concern for possible malignancy. Further investigation is warranted.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I have ordered a mammogram and ultrasound to evaluate the breast masses. I will also refer the patient to a breast specialist for further management.
